title: Board Powers & Duties
description: The elected school board holds the authority and responsibility for overseeing Conroe ISD, setting district-wide goals, and making major decisions about education, finances, and operations. Board members act as a collective body, meaning no single member can make decisions alone — actions are taken through official votes at public meetings. Understanding how the board operates helps community members know who is accountable for district decisions and how to engage with local school governance.
